exercises.title: Square Function
exercises.instructions:
Write a function called square that takes a number and returns its square.
Print the result of square(9).
exercises.hints: Use return n * n or return n ** 2

exercises.title: Check Prime
exercises.instructions:
Write a function called isPrime(n) that returns true if n is prime, false otherwise.
Test with isPrime(7) and isPrime(10).
exercises.hints: A prime number has no divisors other than 1 and itself.
